c.d: The range of operating systems and devices the app supports, including cross-platform functionality.
The rate at which files are transferred between devices, typically measured in MB/s.
The maximum allowable size for a single file transfer.
The security measures implemented by the app, such as encryption protocols and compliance with standards like GDPR.

c.n: User Interface and Ease of Use
c.d: The intuitiveness and user-friendliness of the app's interface.
Extra functionalities offered by the app, such as cloud storage integration, media playback, or collaboration tools.
